title: Word2vec Word Embeddings (3 year)
content:
# Word2vec Word Embeddings (3 year)

Authors: Pair, Emma
Published: 2021-12-08T02:07:09Z
Subjects: Computer and Information Science, Social Sciences
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/SATUTC

These are word2vec word embeddings created from article text grouped into three years (e.g. 1998-2000, 2001-2003) from the Daily Nation, a Kenyan newspaper, and the corresponding vocabulary files.

Citation: Pair, Emma, 2021, "Word2vec Word Embeddings (3 year)", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/SATUTC, Harvard Dataverse, V1
